10#ifndef LLVM_MC_MCASMINFOCOFF_H
11#define LLVM_MC_MCASMINFOCOFF_H
12
13#include "llvm/MC/MCAsmInfo.h"
14
15namespace llvm {
16 class MCAsmInfoCOFF : public MCAsmInfo {
17 virtual void anchor();
18 protected:
19 explicit MCAsmInfoCOFF();
20 };
21
22 class MCAsmInfoMicrosoft : public MCAsmInfoCOFF {
23 void anchor() override;
24 protected:
25 explicit MCAsmInfoMicrosoft();
26 };
27
28 class MCAsmInfoGNUCOFF : public MCAsmInfoCOFF {
29 void anchor() override;
30 protected:
31 explicit MCAsmInfoGNUCOFF();
32 };
33}
